content_body: Upon entering Crooked Creek, it was no short of our expectations. The home is fantastic and is the most enjoyable vacation experience had by all due to the wonderment.  No need to say, We look forward to a yearly return. This home reflects peace, serenity and every comfort of home. Thanksgiving here was wonderful. I must admit that the most phenomenal part of this experience was meeting Travis "the future CEO of Cabin Rentals of Georgia." As expressed to both Gary and Lissa personally "you've outdone yourselves." Travis is an extreme joy. I can't wait to meet adult Travis who will once again shake my hand, look into my eyes and say, "pleased to meet you." Oh we can't forget the people of Blue Ridge. This is a place where the warmth of the people is like a warm blanket. Thank You Blue Ridge for embracing us.
title: Amazing Thanksgiving in Blue Ridge, Georgia
